title: crinum zeylanicum
intro: Crinum zeylanicum, also known as the water hyacinth or wild calla, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical Asia. The medicinal properties of Crinum zeylanicum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Crinum zeylanicum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to the study, crinum zeylanicum contains a variety of compounds, including over 150 alkaloids of the Amaryllidaceae type, which have noted effects such as analgesic, anticholinergic, antitumour and antiviral properties.
